texto: Life has a plan for each of us
autor: we may not understand the whys on our journey but every event is meaningful nonetheless.
explicacao: Citação de we may not understand the whys on our journey but every event is meaningful nonetheless. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Life has a plan for each of us” articula reflexao, ken-poirot em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
